system_context: Documents are ranked and filtered using titles tags dates source metadata and provenance
diagnostic: usable data with documented review needs

system_context: Passages are embedded and retrieved for answer generation but some lack citation and source metadata
diagnostic: partial discipline; strengthen missingness documentation, provenance, validation, representativeness, and uncertainty communication

system_context: Raw observations cleaned tables analysis outputs and figures are documented with validation reports
diagnostic: strong data-quality evidence and computational judgment discipline

system_context: Some entity relationships are absent because extraction coverage and review status are incomplete
diagnostic: usable data with documented review needs

system_context: Rows with missing values are dropped before reporting and data freshness is not displayed
diagnostic: high risk; missingness, weak provenance, poor validation, or undercoverage may distort computation
